flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indiana University-Indianapolis fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (18.7k → 13.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-Indianapolis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Indiana University-Indianapolis are 15% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($55.2k vs $48.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Indiana University-Indianapolis fell 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($22.3k → $20.0k).
